summary: Update mode testing complete. All landing page pricing updates verified: 4 tiers (Free, Player Coming Soon, Game Master £3.99, Legendary £5.99). Legendary tier shows 'Player tier included*' with note about benefits when Player tier launches. Home page Player section locked with 'Coming Soon' overlay blocking character creation. GM section fully functional - campaigns visible and accessible. Previous features verified working: level up flow, edit character, HP clamping.
